text: Science has a clearer story about latent TB than social media does. Latent tuberculosis, or latent TB, hides in your body without symptoms, yet it can reactivate. Many think it’s harmless, but it can lead to active TB if left untreated. Studies suggest about 10% of those with latent TB will develop active disease. Understanding latent TB is crucial for prevention, especially for vulnerable groups. Want more science clarity? Hit subscribe and stay informed!
